textByHashes.2319f3c317074bb681f8a1ab70ccfad790c41ccb: Hello there. How can I help you, brave adventurer?
textByHashes.835c2298fa8d3aed6593cc23fec99078df63084c: I sell rune stones. I've got some good stuff, some really powerful little rocks. Take a look.
textByHashes.78a8fae1fba42645e077d983117817fe4ab27ee2: That, my friend, is the mage battle arena. Top mages come from all over Gielinor to compete in the arena.
textByHashes.4e08c401c017f592ce64225887aaba874cbadd02: Few return, most get fried, hence the smell.
textByHashes.89c4170017962426ba0ae0944c7282e24a473430: You'll need to have completed the Easy Wilderness Achievement Diary to qualify for free runes.
textByHashes.2ebfedbbee5c436f92c0aacfae6f0184c118ad6b: You need more free space before you can claim your free runes.
textByHashes.10daf5a0233c25d8eb02342a40ab6572da72da39: There you go. Come back tomorrow for some more!
textByHashes.4a7b175f5f6a9a2fa1d921ff86af6bc941e65e80: You've already claimed your free runes today. Come back tomorrow for some more.
